## Summary

Create README-local understandings folders with numbered explanation entries. Use when the user asks to capture an understanding, save an explanation, create…

## Description

Create README-local understandings folders with numbered explanation entries. Use when the user asks to capture an understanding, save an explanation, create an understandings folder, preserve a chat explanation, or make README-local knowledge easy for future AIs and humans to read.

## Invoke

Use **understandings-library**.

`audit-understandings`, `check-library`, `file-understandings`
